current_run.description: Given an oracle that computes f(x) = (x & s) ^ ((x >> k) & s) for a secret integer s and a secret shift k, find s and k. The operation '&' denotes bitwise AND, '>>' denotes right bit shift, and '^' denotes bitwise XOR. This problem is non-linear due to the bitwise AND operation and the cyclic dependency introduced by the shift.
